LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT HOUSE OF AIR, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE RELEASE IS CLEAR AND UNAMBIGUOUS AND EXCULPATES DEFENDANT FROM PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF CANNOT AVOID THE RELEASE BY ARGUING THAT SHE IS NOT PROFICIENT IN ENGLISH. SEE RANDAS V. YMCA OF METROPOLITAN LOS ANGELES (1993) 17 CAL.APP.4TH 158. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-26-2014 Vacated

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jul-02-2014 Off Calendar

TDN SWEEP
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Set For Trial On Oct-14-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summ Judgmnt; Index; Table Of Contents
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Goggin, Esq., 415.981.9290, for plaintiff Diana Torres.
Laura Flynn, Esq., 415.981.6630, for defendant House of Air, LLC.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT HOUSE OF AIR, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. The release is clear and unambiguous and exculpates defendant from plaintiff's claims. Plaintiff cannot avoid the release by arguing that she is not proficient in English. See Randas v. YMCA of Metropolitan Los Angeles (1993) 17 Cal.App.4th 158. Order signed in open court. Judge: Peter Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
